description: Testing environment setup and test data preparation for batch processing, ensuring correct configuration and test data isolation.

test_view_points.viewpoint: Verify evironment for Testing
expected_result: Folder/server run batch is correcttly
All email sends and received are email test (not contain customer/end user email)

There is no API is called to Production evironment in batch
- Change to API test or mockup
Database to get or insert information is correctly

test_view_points.viewpoint: Prepare the test data
expected_result: Upload input data to server (S3) ready for batch if need

Create data of all case of testing

Note: There is no data contained any information of customer and end-user

description: Testing batch execution including command validation, input processing, API integration, output generation, and error handling.

test_view_points.viewpoint:
Verify batch is run normally when:
- inputting correct command with valid parameters (if have)
expected_result: Batch is run normally

test_view_points.viewpoint:
Verify error message displays and batch can not run when:
- using incorrect command line
expected_result:
- Error message displays correctly
- Batch is not run

test_view_points.viewpoint:
Verify error message displays and batch can not run when:
- missing any required parameters
expected_result:
- Error message displays correctly
- Batch is not run

test_view_points.viewpoint:
Verify batch is run normally when inputting:
- valid required parameters (if have)
- missing any optional parameters
expected_result: Batch is run normally with default setting value of missing parameters [base on spec]

test_view_points.viewpoint:
Verify error message displays and batch can not run in cases:
- inputting invalid parameters
- invalid parmeters' name
- redundant parameter
expected_result:
- Error message displays correctly
- Batch is not run

test_view_points.viewpoint:
Verify error message displays and batch can not run when:
- missing value of each parameters
expected_result:
- Error message displays correctly
- Batch is not run
[base on spec: some spec permits batch to process with default values of parameters]

test_view_points.viewpoint:
Verify error message displays and batch can not run when:
- inputting invalid value for each parameters 
(Validation base on spec, check the same with input box's case)
expected_result:
- Error message displays correctly
- Batch is not run

test_view_points.viewpoint:
Verify batch get correct input files/data corresponding inputted parameters 
- valid path input files
- valid files input (format/capacity/content)
expected_result: - Get correct input files/data to process

test_view_points.viewpoint:
Verify error message displays and batch is stopped when having any error on input files/data
- not have permision to access files or database:
- files is not existing
- invalid files type/name/format
- invalid file's content (Check validation of each column content)
- Capacity < Min 
- Capacity > Max
- The number of rowin file  > Max row
- Invalid image file size (width - height for image only)
expected_result:
- Error message displays correctly
- Batch is stopped
- Nothing change

test_view_points.viewpoint:
Verify batch call API correctly when running:
- correct API
- corect format or rule (Eg: Maximum for every calling API is 200 responses)
- get fully API responses
expected_result:
- Call correct API 
- Get correct responsed

(To test each phase, QA can request Developer write log or comment other phase on source code)

test_view_points.viewpoint:
Verify error message displays and batch is stopped when having any error on calling API
[base on spec]
- API is not existing
- not have permistion to access API
expected_result:
- Error message displays correctly
- Batch is stopped
- Nothing change

test_view_points.viewpoint:
Verify result is correctly when batch runs completely
(use small data test for Check all logic cases firstly)
- generate output files successfully
- update/process data correctly on DB
expected_result:
- Generate output files successfully
 + total files
- Update/process data correctly on DB
[base on spec]

test_view_points.viewpoint:
Verify data on output files is correctly after running batch successfully
- correct output folder
- correct format name/data
- correct content
expected_result: Data on output files is correctly base on spec

test_view_points.viewpoint: Verify data on DB is processed correctly after running batch successfully
expected_result: Data on DB is processed correctly base on spec

test_view_points.viewpoint:
Verify all data is rolled back when happening error on processing of batch
- timeout
- disconnect the internet
- server down
.....
expected_result: All data is rolled back, nothing change

test_view_points.viewpoint: Verify all data is kept at current time when user stops batch suddenly
expected_result: All data is kept at current time

test_view_points.viewpoint:
Verify all other specification of batch is implemented correctly

Eg:
- Delete input files after running batch
- Backup data output before
...
expected_result: All logic is processed correctly base on spec

test_view_points.viewpoint: Verify all information is not related is no changed after running batch successfully
expected_result: All information is not related is no changed

test_view_points.viewpoint:
Verify batch is inserted to a queue when many user run batch at the same time
[base on spec]
expected_result:
Batch is run accorrding queue, many user can not run batch at the same time
[base on spec]

description: Testing log file generation, format, content and database logging functionality.

test_view_points.viewpoint: Verify log files is generated when running batch the first time
expected_result: Log files is generated correctly

test_view_points.viewpoint:
Verify log files is generated by day
[base on spec]
expected_result: Log files is generated by day

test_view_points.viewpoint: Verify log files's name is generated correctly
expected_result: Log files's name is generated correctly

test_view_points.viewpoint:
Verify log is inserted into DB when result is PASSED or FAILED
[base on spec]
expected_result: Log is inserted into DB correctly

test_view_points.viewpoint:
Verify all events are writen on log files/ or displays on run batch screen
[base on spec]
- Start
- parameter
- Block start-Processing- end any events/process
- Error
- End process
expected_result: All events are writen on log files/ or displays on run batch screen correctly

test_view_points.viewpoint:
Verify time on log is outputed correctly
- time of any events/process
- timezone

Note: Check time when end/start of year (time usually has error)
expected_result: Time on log file is correctly

description: Testing email notification system for batch processing results and errors.

test_view_points.viewpoint: Verify success email is sent to configed email when batch runs successfully
expected_result:
Configed email received successful email
- Sender
- Tite
- Content
- Result run batch

test_view_points.viewpoint: Verify error email is sent to configed email when batch happens any errors
expected_result:
Configed email received error email
- Sender
- Tite
- Content
- Result run batch

test_view_points.viewpoint: Verify no email is send when batch is stopped suddenly by user
expected_result: Configed email is not received any email

item_type: Run batch with big size files
description: Testing batch performance with large data sets.

test_view_points.viewpoint: Verify batch perfomance when running with input files have big size and many data is processed
expected_result:
- All data is processed correctly
- Time process is aprroved by Customer about performance

description: Testing additional batch functionalities including scheduling, error handling, and configuration management.

test_view_points.viewpoint:
Verify batch is run automatically by setting time in config file:
Ex:
- run 00:00 daily
- run 14h00 on every Monday
expected_result:
Batch is run automatically on time

(QA can require developer set a specific time to test)

test_view_points.viewpoint: Verify batch is re-run when failed with setting time
expected_result: Batch is re-run automatically with time setting

test_view_points.viewpoint:
Verify batch is processed with latest data on DB/server when having any changes in progress run 

Eg:
- batch download data when user is uploading new data on web form/ other upload batch
expected_result: Batch is processed correctly with latest data on DB/server

test_view_points.viewpoint:
Verify batch continues processing next item when having error with current item, no stop batch

Eg:
- batch call API for 10 items to generate 10 output file. When response is 404 for the first item, expected calling to the next item to process, no stop batch
expected_result: Batch continues processing next item when having error with current item, no stop batch

test_view_points.viewpoint: Verify batch is run with corresponding config value when changing data on env/config file
expected_result: Batch is run with corresponding config value on env/config file

test_view_points.viewpoint:
Some programing language, user input incomplete command line but system still understand and run batch normally

Eg: 
- Command run batch on php laravel: php artisan review:output
- User input: php artisan review:out => batch run normally
expected_result: Batch run normally when inputting incomplete command
